title: Pithampur Heat Wave
lead: Pithampur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Pithampur are extremely hot and dry, with a relative humidity of 28% and a wind speed of 12.6 km/h.
The heat wave has resulted in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.3 GG, indicating a significant demand for cooling.
The city's energy consumption is expected to increase due to the high temperatures, with no Heating Degree Day (HDD) value recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
